title: Calcite Recipe
description: Now you can craft your own calcite
body:
🪨 Calcite Recipe Datapack  
Craft the geode’s glow—no cave diving required!  
This datapack introduces a custom recipe for Calcite, letting builders access this smooth white block from surface-level resources.

✨ Features  
✅ Shapeless recipe using 1 Cobblestone + 1 Amethyst Block  
🧩 Lore-friendly integration with overworld and geode progression  
🔁 Modular JSON structure for easy editing and expansion  
🛠️ Compatible with Minecraft 1.17+
